title: Enhanced
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ef5a2058afdf4d1dc9773b0b6dc98876c6328a.png)

Enhanced is a vanilla style pack that blends the classic look of Minecraft with the modern look. This pack adds new models, varied textures, and new colours that gives the game a more whimsical feel while still feeling like vanilla Minecraft. I started working on this pack in 2016 and have been adding textures every year since.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ca8ba5ad1c1843ff3a0ecb38de3707acd7283c5.webp)

Features
-
- Connected wood textures with new colours
- A new cleaner GUI
- A custom font
- 3D rails, ladders, and dripstone
- New function block textures, eg. crafting and enchanting tables
- Modified Crimson and Warped biome colours
- Borderless paintings
- Connected polished blocks
- Connected chiseled blocks that look like pillars
- Modern looking lily pads
- Hanging leaves from cherry and azalea trees
- Hanging roots that look like beautiful wisteria plants
- Allium looks like lavender
- New armour colours
- New wall textures
- More whimsical leaf colours
- Blooming chorus flowers
- Updated mob models, such as cows, sheep, and pigs
- Varied mob textures
- Lots of quality of life changes like a lower shield
- And much more

**Optifine or alternatives are required for features such as:**

- Connected textures
- Emissive textures
- Custom entity models/textures

Support for Fresh Animations coming soon

All gallery images are taken with Complementary shaders
